steps.t: The turtle can be found hiding among fallen stones just to the east of the Circle of Blood. Radagast has asked you to coax the turtle to safety, teach…
Radagast the Brown is at Barad Dhorn in Agamaur. Radagast has asked you to coax a turtle to safety, teaching you the importance of the bond with the g…
Radagast the Brown is at Barad Dhorn. You should find out if Radagast the Brown has anything else for you to do.
